title: Song lyrics: chorus repetition
description: Repeating chorus structure — rhythm of song
text: shine shine shine on shine shine shine on we are young we are gold we will never grow old shine shine shine on

tips.text: Choruses repeat for a reason — train muscle memory
Type along to a beat in your head

tips.target: shine shine shine on shine shine shine on we are young

tips.text: Speed comes from rhythm, not effort

tips.target: we are gold we will never grow old shine shine shine on

character_tips.anna: Song lyrics are repetition by design — perfect for typing speed.
character_tips.maxim: Chorus structure = pattern recognition for fingers.
character_tips.klavochka: Like singing in the shower, my sunshine 🚿🎵
